name: 16q23_3_WWOX_SD
description: 16q23.1-q23.3 SD modules within the WWOX/FRA16D fragile site. Multiple small intragenic SDs at ~95% identity contribute to instability of this common fragile site and intragenic WWOX deletions seen in cancer and neurodevelopmental syndromes.

architecture.internal_structure: Intragenic SD blocks of ~10-30 kb at ~94-96% identity in WWOX introns 1, 5 and 8; co-localise with FRA16D fragile site.
